title: [Goal] Notepad
description:
## Tasks

- [x] **#g008#t01**: Replace modal dialogs with bottom-right Panel component using shadcn, triggered by buttons instead of menus (CHONKY-style anchored panel)
- [x] **#g008#t02**: Use Ioskeley Mono custom font on mode selector UI
- [x] **#g008#t03**: Fix sb-plugin-root wrapper breaking Viewfinder layout (not spanning 100vw)
  mountSveltePlugin() wraps every Svelte component in a div.sb-plugin-root. When the Viewfinder is mounted via this utility, the extra wrapper div constrains the page content width, preventing it from spanning 100vw. Investigate root cause and fix.
- [x] **#g008#t04**: Add sidepanel config to core-ui.config.json with docs and inspector trigger buttons
- [x] **#g008#t05**: Create sidePanelStore.ts Svelte store for managing side panel open/close state and active tab
- [x] **#g008#t06**: Fix icon fill colors on dark trigger buttons — add dark-theme-aware CSS fallbacks to trigger-button.svelte
- [x] **#g008#t07**: Increase CoreUIBar right spacing when sidepanel is open (24px → 48px)
- [x] **#g008#t08**: Lock CoreUI bar to light-mode colors — remove dark-theme fallbacks, add core-ui-colors.css
- [x] **#g008#t09**: Remove dark border-left from sidepanel in mode states for consistent collar color
- [x] **#g008#t10**: Fix gap color between page and sidepanel — make body transparent in mode states so html mode-color shows through
- [x] **#g008#t11**: Unify sidepanel header — single line with title + close, remove inspector search button
- [x] **#g008#t12**: Force light-mode button colors with !important overrides on [data-core-ui-bar] to beat dark: Tailwind classes
- [x] **#g008#t13**: Move Show flow info, Reset all params, and Hide mode into a standalone Devtools dropdown menu with gear icon, visible only in inspect mode
- [x] **#g008#t14**: Fix button color inconsistency — add trigger variant to Button, remove dark: class conflicts from TriggerButton
- [x] **#g008#t15**: Fix data-slot override — move data-slot=button after spread to prevent DropdownMenu.Trigger from overriding it
- [x] **#g008#t16**: Remove Source tab from docs panel — show only README with GitHub link in header
- [x] **#g008#t17**: Reduce excessive CoreUIBar right offset when sidepanel is open (48px → 24px)
- [x] **#g008#t18**: Add tooltip component and tooltips for all CoreUIBar menu buttons
- [x] **#g008#t19**: Deep-link GitHub button in inspector to file line number, strip query params from filename label
- [x] **#g008#t20**: Add configurable Cmd+K shortcut to open command menu, increase footer text size, show shortcut hints in footer
- [x] **#g008#t21**: Keyboard navigation: roving tabindex toolbar, skip-to-controls, accent focus border, side panel focus management
- [x] **#g008#t22**: Rename Octicon to StoryboardIcon — multi-source icon system with Feather Icons, rotation/flip props
- [x] **#g008#t23**: Add Iconoir icon source — use square-dashed for inspector
- [x] **#g008#t24**: Add strokeWeight and scale props to StoryboardIcon
- [x] **#g008#t25**: Namespace icon names (primer/feather/iconoir), add config meta, rename to Icon
- [x] **#g008#t26**: Register iconoir/plus-circle-solid, support fill-based iconoir icons
- [x] **#g008#t27**: Switch create menu to iconoir/plus-circle stroke variant
- [x] **#g008#t28**: Fix ColorModeSwitcher button layout — use leadingVisual prop instead of manual icon+Stack
- [x] **#g008#t29**: Simplify comment button — remove submenu, direct toggle (login if logged out, comment mode if logged in), subscribe to commentMode for idle state
- [x] **#g008#t30**: Add Logout (remove token) option to Devtools submenu in command menu
- [x] **#g008#t31**: Rename scene→flow in README.md — update all hooks, functions, file suffixes, URL params, prose, and API reference
- [x] **#g008#t32**: Rename scene→flow in AGENTS.md — update data system docs, hooks, exports, and examples
- [x] **#g008#t33**: Document new features in README: simplified comment button, devtools logout, flow switcher toolbar, useFlows hook, listFlows/listPrototypes utilities
- [x] **#g008#t34**: Fix GH Pages deploy — SSH→HTTPS git rewrite, repo name storyboard-source→storyboard

---
_Managed by clips • Goal ID: #g008_
